scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:pages && npx wrangler pages deploy docs --project-name=question-bank
scripts.deploy:cf: npm run build:pages && npx wrangler pages deploy docs --project-name=question-bank && node scripts/deploy-gh-mirror.mjs
scripts.rapidocr:install: python3 -m venv .venv-rapidocr && .venv-rapidocr/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv-rapidocr/bin/python -m pip install -r scripts/requirements-rapidocr.txt
